visualMatch.reason: Aura3D screenshot is a strong sneaker product render with plinth and studio lighting. Three.js also succeeds, though the sneaker is smaller/less premium in the frame.

modifiability.reason: Aura3D output works visually but uses raw Three.js for the live render and a hand-written asset module, which weakens library-level modifiability. Three.js is more straightforward.
